1.0.0

Usage: s3cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --version        Show version information.
  -p <profile>     Set the profile to use
  -e <endpoint>    Override the endpoint from the profile
  --proxy <proxy>  Use this proxy for request
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information.

Commands:
  bucket           
  object           
  profile          

Run 's3cli [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Usage: s3cli bucket [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  create        Create a bucket
  empty         Delete all objects within a bucket
  list          List all buckets you own
  rm            Delete all the objects in a bucket along with the bucket itself

Run 'bucket [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:
Usage: s3cli bucket [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  create        Create a bucket
  empty         Delete all objects within a bucket
  list          List all buckets you own
  rm            Delete all the objects in a bucket along with the bucket itself

Run 'bucket [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
Create a bucket

Usage: s3cli bucket create [options] <BucketName>

Arguments:
  BucketName           Bucket name

Options:
  -e|--enable-locking  Enable object locking support on the bucket
  -c|--canned-acl      Set the a canned ACL on the bucket
                       Allowed values are: Unknown, Private, PublicRead,
                       PublicReadWrite, AwsExecRead, AuthenticatedRead,
                       LogDeliveryWrite.
                       Default value is: Unknown.
  -?|-h|--help         Show help information.

                       Allowed values are: Unknown, Private, PublicRead,
                       PublicReadWrite, AwsExecRead, AuthenticatedRead,
                       LogDeliveryWrite.
                       Default value is: Unknown.
  -?|-h|--help         Show help information.

result.stdout:
Usage: s3cli object [command] [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  cp            Copy one or more objects
  ls            List the objects in a bucket
  lsv           List the object versions in a bucket
  mv            Move one or more objects
  rm            Deletes one or more objects
  sync          Sync changes between a local folder and a remote bucket

Run 'object [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

commands.payload:

Options:
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  cp            Copy one or more objects
  ls            List the objects in a bucket
  lsv           List the object versions in a bucket
  mv            Move one or more objects
  rm            Deletes one or more objects
  sync          Sync changes between a local folder and a remote bucket

Run 'object [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

result.stdout:
List the objects in a bucket

Usage: s3cli object ls [options] <Path>

Arguments:
  Path          Path. E.g: s3://mybucket/prefix/

Options:
  -d|--details  Show detailed output
  -o|--owner    Show owner information
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

result.stdout:
Deletes one or more objects

Usage: s3cli object rm [options] <Resource>

Arguments:
  Resource               The object you want to delete. E.g. s3://bucket/object
                         or s3://bucket/prefix/ to delete a whole prefix

Options:
  -i|--include-versions  Also remove all versions of objects
  -f|--force             Force removal of resources
  -?|-h|--help           Show help information.

commands.payload:
Deletes one or more objects

Usage: s3cli object rm [options] <Resource>

Arguments:
  Resource               The object you want to delete. E.g. s3://bucket/object
                         or s3://bucket/prefix/ to delete a whole prefix

Options:
  -i|--include-versions  Also remove all versions of objects
  -f|--force             Force removal of resources
  -?|-h|--help           Show help information.

result.stdout:
Sync changes between a local folder and a remote bucket

Usage: s3cli object sync [options] <Source> <Destination>

Arguments:
  Source           
  Destination      

Options:
  -c|--concurrent  Number of concurrent uploads/downloads
                   Default value is: 8.
  -p|--preserve    When set it preserves timestamps on local files
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information.

commands.payload:

Arguments:
  Source

Options:
  -c|--concurrent  Number of concurrent uploads/downloads
                   Default value is: 8.
  -p|--preserve    When set it preserves timestamps on local files
  -?|-h|--help     Show help information.
